DEFENDANT BAY AREA STONE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NALL & CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA STONE LLC. $3,836.87 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,901.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF APR-09-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITOR NALL & CO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DIANA FUSHIN DOUGLAS, CFO. DEFENDANT JUDGMENT DEBTOR BAY AREA STONE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: AFTER THE THIRD AND LAST ATTEMPT, THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT IN DURING THIRD ATTEMPT.
